knowledge_base.name: support
knowledge_base.description: Local interview RAG evaluation knowledge base

documents.title: refund policy
documents.content: Refund policy supports seven day no reason refund. Support response SLA is within 24 hours. Keep order id and payment proof.

knowledge_bases.name: support
knowledge_bases.description: Local interview RAG evaluation support knowledge base

documents.title: refund policy
documents.content: Refund policy supports seven day no reason refund. Support response SLA is within 24 hours. Keep order id and payment proof.

documents.title: feedback replay
documents.content: When a user leaves negative feedback about refund handling, replay the feedback with the session id, refund request, order id, and payment proof before escalating to human support.

knowledge_bases.name: saas support
knowledge_bases.description: Local interview RAG evaluation SaaS knowledge base

documents.title: saas administration policy
documents.content: SaaS workspace admin approval is required for tenant seat downgrade. SSO SCIM provisioning changes sync within 15 minutes. Audit log export is retained for 180 days.
